title: Fiducian Portfolio Services Limited — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: APRA imposed additional licence conditions (effective 2 April 2026) on Fiducian Portfolio Services Limited, trustee of the Fiducian Superannuation Fund (approximately 9,779 member accounts, over $3.1 billion in funds under management), after a review identified concerns including insufficiently rigorous investment selection criteria and due diligence, weak monitoring/reporting frameworks, management of related-party conflicts of interest, and deficiencies in board governance and oversight. Note: this is a distinct legal entity from Fiducian Investment Management Services Limited (T-AU-2026-00034), which is the subject of a separate ASIC greenwashing action against a different Fiducian-group entity.
scope: Subject of additional APRA licence conditions effective 2 April 2026 following a review of investment governance; Findings included insufficiently rigorous investment selection/due diligence criteria and weak monitoring frameworks; Findings also included deficiencies in board governance and management of related-party conflicts of interest
